channel.title: GitHub HCL Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
item.description: Terraform module which creates VPC resources on AWS

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
item.description: Terraform module which creates S3 bucket resources on AWS

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-rds
item.description: Terraform module which creates RDS resources on AWS

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-kubernetes-engine
item.description: A Terraform module for configuring GKE clusters.

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-rds-aurora
item.description: Terraform module which creates RDS Aurora resources on AWS

item.title: Azure/caf-terraform-landingzones
item.description: Cloud Adoption Framework for Azure - Terraform landing zones

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-security-group
item.description: Terraform module which creates EC2-VPC security groups on AWS

item.title: gruntwork-io/terraform-aws-utilities
item.description: A collection of useful Terraform utilities

item.title: CloudHealth/terraform-cloudhealth-iam
item.description: CloudHealth Terraform module for IAM Roles provisioning

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-sql-db
item.description: Modular Cloud SQL database instance for Terraform.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-key-pair
item.description: Terraform Module to Automatically Generate SSH Key Pairs (Public/Private Keys)

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-s3-log-storage
item.description: This module creates an S3 bucket suitable for receiving logs from other AWS services such as S3, CloudFront, and CloudTrail

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-nat
item.description: This module handles opinionated Google Cloud Platform Cloud NAT creation and configuration.

item.title: hashicorp/terraform-aws-vault
item.description: A Terraform Module for how to run Vault on AWS using Terraform and Packer

item.title: Azure/azure-spring-cloud-reference-architecture
item.description: Quickstarts for deploying Azure Spring Cloud Reference Architecture - using Terraform, ARM Template, or Azure CLI

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-route53-alias
item.description: Terraform Module to Define Vanity Host/Domain (e.g. `brand.com`) as an ALIAS record

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
item.description: Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-network
item.description: A Terraform module that makes it easy to set up a new VPC Network in GCP.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-cloudfront-s3-cdn
item.description: Terraform module to easily provision CloudFront CDN backed by an S3 origin

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
item.description: Terraform module to create an Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) cluster and associated worker instances on AWS

item.title: openshift/okd
item.description: The self-managing, auto-upgrading, Kubernetes distribution for everyone

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-iam
item.description: Terraform module which creates IAM resources on AWS

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-security-hub
item.description: Terraform module to provision AWS Security Hub
